checkout.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

addressFieldset.title: Delivery Address
addressFieldset.description: You can enter your address manually or use your current location to auto-fill your address details.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.whatsappDescription: We can reach you faster on WhatsApp.
delivery.useLocationDescription: Tap to fill postal code, city, and the first address line when possible.
delivery.useLocationPrivacy: We use your approximate GPS location only. No map, no exact address.
delivery.locationErrorDescription: Allow location access in your browser (lock or info icon in the address bar), or enter your address manually.
delivery.addressLineDescription: Street name, neighborhood, or landmark — whatever helps the driver find you.

success.title: Order created successfully
success.message: Thank you for your order! The merchant will receive your order and contact you soon.

storeSelector.heading: Select a store
storeSelector.description: Enter the store slug to view the storefront.
storeSelector.errorNotFound: Store not found. Please check the slug.

description.line1: Be the first to know when we go live.

input.placeholder: Enter your email or phone number

comingSoon.success: Thank you! We'll notify you when we launch.
